data.jsCode: function txt(){if(message&&message.text){return String(message.text).trim()}return ""}function ask(t){send_message({text:t,parse_mode:"HTML"})}function clean(){delete_context("_survey_quick_step")}var steps=[{key:"survey_q1",prompt:get_context("param_q1_prompt")||"1-savol: Xizmat yoki mahsulot haqida umumiy fikringiz qanday?",error:"Kamida 3 ta belgi kiriting.",min:3},{key:"survey_q2",prompt:get_context("param_q2_prompt")||"2-savol: Siz uchun eng muhim afzallik nima bo'ldi?",error:"Kamida 3 ta belgi kiriting.",min:3},{key:"survey_q3",prompt:get_context("param_q3_prompt")||"3-savol: Nimani yaxshilashni tavsiya qilasiz?",error:"Kamida 3 ta belgi kiriting.",min:3}];var step=parseInt(get_context("_survey_quick_step")||"0",10);var answer=txt();if(answer.toLowerCase()==="/cancel"){clean();exit("cancelled")}if(step>0){var prev=steps[step-1];if(answer.length<(prev.min||1)){ask(prev.error+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");wait_for_input()}set_context(prev.key,answer)}if(step>=steps.length){send_message({text:get_context("param_success_message")||("So'rovnoma qabul qilindi. 1) "+(get_context("survey_q1")||"")+" 2) "+(get_context("survey_q2")||"")+" 3) "+(get_context("survey_q3")||"")),parse_mode:"HTML"});clean();exit("completed")}ask(steps[step].prompt+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");set_context("_survey_quick_step",String(step+1));wait_for_input();
